name: synthetic-bad-slug-deps-fixture
_comment: NEGATIVE data for S3 — the risky slug-helper PR. No sibling lockfile. `uuidd` is a Levenshtein-1 typo of `uuid` (slopsquat); `slugify: latest` is mutable; `slug-helper` points at a git source that bypasses lockfile integrity. pin-check must fire slopsquat + mutable (+ no-lockfile/unpinned).
